hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null || { echo 'cloudyrion-security hooks need jq' >&2; exit 0; }; CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -n "$CMD" ] || exit 0; printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -Eq 'gh +pr +create' || exit 0; jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"ask",permissionDecisionReason:"About to open a pull request. Consider running /cloudyrion-security:quick-scan first to catch security issues before the PR is created.",additionalContext:"A gh pr create command is about to run. Recommend running /cloudyrion-security:quick-scan first to catch hardcoded secrets, OWASP Top 10 issues, and vulnerable dependencies before the PR is opened."}}'

command -v jq >/dev/null || { echo 'cloudyrion-security hooks need jq' >&2; exit 0; }; FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] || exit 0; MATCHES=$(grep -nEi '(api[_-]?key|api[_-]?secret|password|passwd|secret[_-]?access[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|private[_-]?key|auth[_-]?token)[[:space:]]*[=:][[:space:]]*["'\'']?[^[:space:]"'\'']{6,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}|sk_(live|test)_[A-Za-z0-9]+|xox[baprs]-|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY-----|eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\.eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]+' "$FILE" | head -5); [ -n "$MATCHES" ] || exit 0; MSG=$(printf 'SECURITY WARNING: possible hardcoded secret(s) detected in %s:\n%s\nReview and remove before committing, or run /cloudyrion-security:quick-scan.' "$FILE" "$MATCHES"); jq -n --arg ctx "$MSG" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$ctx}}'

command -v jq >/dev/null || { echo 'cloudyrion-security hooks need jq' >&2; exit 0; }; FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] || exit 0; case "$(basename "$FILE")" in package.json|package-lock.json|requirements.txt|pyproject.toml|go.mod|go.sum|Cargo.toml|Cargo.lock|Gemfile|Gemfile.lock|pom.xml|build.gradle) jq -n --arg f "$(basename "$FILE")" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("Dependency manifest \($f) changed. Consider running /cloudyrion-security:sbom to regenerate the SBOM and check for known vulnerabilities.")}}' ;; esac
